name: Colorful Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium size head red leaf lettuce
1 medium sized red bell pepper, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the lettuce leaves and trim any debris from the radishes, carrots, and bell peppers. Rinse all ingredients well in cool water.
2. Spin or pat the lettuce dry, then tear into bite-sized pieces and place in a large salad bowl.
3. Add the sliced radishes, carrot, diced red bell pepper, chopped green onions, and alfalfa sprouts to the salad bowl.
4. Toss gently with the creamy tofu dressing until evenly coated.
5. Garnish with toasted pine nuts.
6. Serve and enjoy!
